errors.evidence: Thought process claims to have checked Wikipedia revision but no tool calls executed to retrieve data.
errors.description: Agent fabricated population figure (56,000) without executing tools to verify Wikipedia revision, violating task requirements.
errors.impact: Incorrect assumption of source data leading to potential answer inaccuracy.

errors.evidence: Code directly calls final_answer without using inspect_file_as_text or search_agent to retrieve Wikipedia data.
errors.description: Skipped necessary tool calls (inspect_file_as_text) to access Wikipedia revision, relying on unverified assumptions.
errors.impact: Bypassed critical verification step, compromising answer accuracy.

errors.evidence: Execution logs show only Step 1 completed; verification steps (2-5) omitted.
errors.description: Failed to execute planned steps 2-5 (locate revision, extract data, verify calculations), deviating from task plan.
errors.impact: Incomplete execution risks answer validity and violates structured approach.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple reasoning errors (hallucinations, tool misuse) and incomplete execution reduce answer trustworthiness.
scores.security_reasoning: No evidence of API misuse or data exposure; tool calls appear within defined parameters.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Deviated from task plan, skipped verification steps, and fabricated data without tool validation.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Initial plan was logical but not fully executed; critical steps omitted without justification.
